revision_summary:
Four targeted fixes required before Stage 3 is production-ready:

1. SCHEMA MISUSE — EMPATHY CLASSIFICATION (cherry_pick_moments[0]): Reclassify the Sunrun disclosure at 05:18 from empathy_on_vulnerability_disclosure to a prior-bad-experience trust objection. Update schema_reference to coaching_philosophy.objection_inversion and the TBD rebuttals.scammer_anecdote_reframe / prior-bad-experience section. The coaching insight is sound; the classification and schema anchor are wrong.

2. WEAK REASONING — BUTTON-UP COUNT (coaching_focus[1]): Correct 'zero of four required button-up elements' to 'two of six required button-up elements missing four.' The rep did confirm the appointment datetime and promise a text follow-up, partially satisfying those schema items. The severity of the gap is unchanged but the factual claim must be accurate.

3. MISSED MOMENTS — ADD THREE GAPS: (a) Intro protocol gap at 00:02 — rep used no Ion intro template (no Tesla framing, no form-fill reference, no state mention, no 'how are you doing' pause); this is a hard_required beat Stage 3 never evaluates. (b) Secondary-structure cross-sell signal at 01:24 — Lisa's shed question maps to schema cross_sell_signals (solar_for_secondary_structure TBD); rep dismissed it without routing. (c) Lead-origin ambiguity at 00:02–00:29 — rep is calling back on a number with cut-off digits, no lead type established, which affects bill-collection interpretation per schema lead_types_and_bill_collection_rules.

4. TONE CORRECTION — SCOPE CREEP FRAMING (cherry_pick_moments[1], multi_touch_patterns[0]): Revise the characterization of the net-metering explanation as unilateral rep scope creep. Lisa drove the billing education exchange across three turns. The coaching gap is real (the rep should have used the escape hatch one exchange earlier, at the 05:57 partial-offset concession), but the framing should reflect that Lisa was the primary driver of the exchange length, not the rep choosing to go into educational mode.
